mano_cua.result_summary: NuxtTurnstile组件能渲染显示，但vue model实例持续显示Verifying...未完成验证（native form实例显示Success!），无独立login页面（/login返回404）。两个组件均显示For testing only红色测试标识。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The state remains the same after waiting: Using vue model section: Turnstile widget shows Verifying... (still in verifying state). Using native form section: Turnstile widget shows Success!. There is no dedicated login page at localhost:3000/login (returns 404). After clicking Load Turnstiles, NuxtTurnstile components rendered successfully - one showing Verifying... and one showing Success!.
